top_signals: Iran fires cluster warhead missiles at Tel Aviv — 2 killed Ramat Gan, revenge for Larijani assassination
US drops 5,000-lb bunker busters on hardened Iranian missile sites at Strait of Hormuz
Senate Intel Committee hearing TODAY: Gabbard, CIA Dir Patel, FBI Dir testify on war justification
Putin-Trump phone call TODAY to discuss Ukraine peace — first leader-to-leader contact on Ukraine in weeks
Kabul drug rehab airstrike death toll rises to 408 (BBC/Reuters) — no ceasefire negotiations underway
Gabbard publicly backs Trump's 'imminent threat' determination after NCTC Director Kent resignation
Bahrain intercepts 129 missiles + 221 drones; Gulf states report sustained Iranian bombardment
Ukraine counteroffensive liberates 400+ km² in Zaporizhzhia — Russia's March offensive underperforms
China special envoy mediates Pakistan-Afghanistan — urges ceasefire but no negotiations started
UK Starmer warns against Middle East oil windfall benefiting Russia; Zelensky visits UK today

changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: STABLE (Day 22): ZERO de-escalation signals in active war theaters. Iran escalates with cluster warheads. US escalates with bunker busters. Pakistan kills 408 in Kabul. Israel expands Lebanon ops. Putin-Trump call TODAY is wildcard — Ukraine focus, not ME de-escalation. Senate Intel hearing TODAY — narrative inflection, not battlefield inflection.

latest_news.headline: Senate Intel Committee hearing TODAY — Gabbard, CIA Dir Patel, FBI Dir testify on war justification
latest_news.text: DNI Gabbard, CIA Director Kash Patel, FBI Director to testify before Senate Intelligence Committee annual worldwide threats assessment. Gabbard already publicly backed Trump's 'imminent threat' determination. Follows NCTC Director Kent resignation over war justification. Hearing is today's top political inflection point.

latest_news.headline: Putin-Trump phone call TODAY to discuss Ukraine peace — land, power plants, assets on agenda
latest_news.text: Putin and Trump scheduled for phone call March 18 to discuss Ukraine. Trump says they'll discuss 'land, power plants, dividing certain assets.' Putin rejected 30-day ceasefire on March 13. Kremlin says Trump still engaged. Zelensky visits UK today. First leader-level contact on Ukraine in weeks.

latest_news.headline: US drops 5,000-lb bunker buster bombs on hardened Iranian missile sites at Strait of Hormuz
latest_news.text: US aircraft dropped 'multiple 5,000-pound deep penetrator munitions' on hardened Iranian missile sites along Strait of Hormuz coastline. Part of effort to prevent Iran from striking commercial shipping. Previously used 2,000-lb bombs and 30,000-lb Massive Ordnance Penetrator on nuclear facilities.

latest_news.headline: Kabul drug rehab centre airstrike — death toll rises to 408 (BBC/Reuters confirmed)
latest_news.text: Death toll from Pakistani airstrike on drug treatment centre in Kabul now confirmed at 408. Taliban calls it 'crime against humanity.' China special envoy urges ceasefire. Gulf mediators (Turkey, Qatar, Saudi) too busy with their own war. No ceasefire negotiations started.

latest_news.headline: Ukraine counteroffensive liberates 400+ km² in Zaporizhzhia — Russia's March offensive underperforms
latest_news.text: ISW reports Ukrainian forces liberated 400+ km² in Oleksandrivka and Hulyaipole directions since late January. Russia's planned March offensive has not achieved expected intensity. Ukraine making tactical penetrations. Russian air defenses downed 206 Ukrainian drones overnight.

outlook: CRITICAL (Day 22, 06:00 UTC) — War Day 20. TWO major political events TODAY: (1) Senate Intelligence Committee hearing — Gabbard, CIA Dir Patel, FBI Dir testify on war justification after Kent resignation; (2) Putin-Trump phone call on Ukraine. Iran cluster warheads killed 2 in Ramat Gan. US escalates with bunker busters at Hormuz. Kabul airstrike toll rises to 408. Ukraine counteroffensive gaining ground (400+ km²). China mediates Pakistan-Afghanistan but no ceasefire talks. Oil remains ~$102. NO ceasefire signals in any active war theater.
